summary: First-finish smoke test for Shikha Yadav portfolio. All 9 backend endpoints behave correctly (profile, photo/resume serve + uploads with validation, contact CRUD + validation). Frontend loads with seeded photo, all 9 nav links, 5 projects, 6 services, 13 skills, correct contact info (+91 63942 76341, email, LinkedIn, GitHub), contact form submits and shows success toast, footer has 2026 copyright and tel link. No blockers found.
passed: GET /api/profile returns photo_url and resume_url (both non-null after seeding)
POST /api/profile/photo with valid JPEG -> 200 + photo_url updated
POST /api/profile/resume with valid PDF -> 200 + resume_url updated
POST /api/contact valid payload -> 200 + id returned; GET /api/contact lists it
Frontend loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, hero photo visible (src points to /api/profile/photo/file)
All 9 nav links present and visible (home/about/education/skills/projects/services/experience/resume/contact)
Projects section: 5 cards; Services: 6 cards; Skills: 13 cards
Resume section: download-btn and upload-btn visible
Contact: phone href=tel:+916394276341 (text '+91 63942 76341'), email mailto:shikha29072005@gmail.com, LinkedIn and GitHub URLs match spec
Contact form submission shows success toast 'Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.'
Footer shows 2026 copyright with Shikha Yadav and footer-phone tel:+916394276341
observations: hero-cta-resume element returned no 'href' attribute (likely implemented as a button with onClick that opens the resume URL rather than an <a> tag). Not a blocker as label/behavior present; main agent may verify if anchor with href is preferred.
